steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which statement about the Museo de Las Americas is best supported by the text. “Best supported” means the correct answer must be directly stated or clearly implied in the passage — no outside knowledge, no inference beyond what the words say.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "It is visited by more people than any other Latino cultural institution in the US.": the text never mentions visitor counts or comparisons to other institutions. ✗
  • "It was founded after 2000.": the text explicitly says the museum was founded in 1991, which is before 2000. Directly contradicted. ✗
  • "Its collection includes over 4,800 objects.": the text states “more than 4,800 objects in its collection.” This is a direct restatement of a fact in the passage. ✓
  • "It is no longer located in Denver.": the text states “It is located in Denver.” Directly contradicted. ✗
That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
